condition.expression: ((((NOT (6 IS NULL)) AND ((NOT (1 = 'DO')) OR (1 IS NULL))) AND ((NOT (1 = 'DE')) OR (1 IS NULL))) AND ((NOT (1 = 'TOTAIS')) OR (1 IS NULL)))

expression.expression: CAST(((REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(CFOP AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')) + (REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((TO_CHAR(CAST(F17 AS DOUBLE), 'FM999999999999999990')), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', ''))) AS STRING)
